final:
// // This T-latch toggles its output when the input T is low and keeps its output when T is high.
module T_latch (
    input wire T,
    input wire CLK,
    input wire EN,
    output reg Q
);
    always @(posedge CLK) begin
        if (EN) begin
            if (T) begin
                Q <= ~Q; // Toggle Q if T is high
            end
            // If T is low, Q remains the same
        end
    end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This T-latch toggles its output when the input T is low and keeps its output when T is high.
